narrative: Middle East peace optimism triggers a sharp dollar sell-off as US-Iran tensions ease — DXY -0.51% to 2.5-month lows; gold higher +3.20% near $4,715; equities +1.22%; VIX 16.9. USD/JPY retreats to 156.29 as falling yields compress the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (+1.185% spread) dominates G8 flows on RBNZ hike bias. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
